name: Kael the Cold
lines: You can't pull the trigger if you're swayed by emotion.
Flint is right. Nothing changes unless you break it.
I'll deal with anyone who makes Vesper cry in my own way.

friendly.greeting: So you're the one Flint was talking about. You look pretty strong.
friendly.farewell: Watch your step. The security guards on the VIP floor are persistent.

hostile.greeting: I'm sorry, but it's nothing personal. You're just a target to be eliminated.
hostile.farewell: I'll aim more precisely next time.

description: A young boy from the labor camps. He considers protecting Vesper his sole mission in life.
deathLine: Vesper... I'm sorry... I don't think... I can protect you this time...

dialogue: Vesper: Look at this, Kael. This room feels bigger than our entire camp.
Kael: Don't lose focus, Vesper. It's not safe here yet. Flint told us not to let a single rat slip away.
Vesper: Fine, I get it. But... why did the people here want so much more when they already had all this?
Kael: (Touching a fragile, ornate cabinet) ...Who knows. But it’s fair now. Soon, this place will be ashes, just like our home.
Vesper: (Spots you and aims a small crossbow) Halt! Who goes there? Are you one of those VIP bastards?
encounter.choice_intimidate: "Step aside, brats. Unless you want to get hurt."
result_friend_success: Kael: So you're the 'useful fellow' Flint mentioned. Sorry for the hostility. Vesper, lower your weapon.
Vesper: Hmph. If it weren't for Flint, you'd be full of holes by now! Consider yourself lucky.
result_friend_fail: Kael: Don't lie. Flint never mentioned someone like you. We'll eliminate any suspicious rats here.
Vesper: Caught you! Goodbye, Mr. Liar!
result_intimidate: Kael: We'll show you what happens to those who treat us like kids. Vesper, take position!
Vesper: Already locked on! Get ready to be ventilated!
